overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a rainy night walk through a suburban neighborhood. The player navigates from a street intersection onto a sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and palm trees, encountering a passing pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: turns left from the intersection onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: standing at the rainy intersection then turning left to begin walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt reflecting street lights
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark rainy sky lining the street
tall street lamp casting warm yellow light through the rain
low-rise suburban building with illuminated windows across the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rainy suburban intersection at night, with wet asphalt reflecting the glow of street lamps. Palm trees line the streets in the distance as the camera turns left from the crosswalk onto a sidewalk.

events.description: black sedan with headlights on drives past on the street to the right
pedestrian appears in the distance walking toward the camera along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered wall

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the street with headlights cutting through the rain
pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete block wall covered in colorful graffiti tags including yellow and red artwork
wet concrete sidewalk with puddles reflecting the street lights
strip of grass and dirt between the sidewalk and the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk enclosed by a graffiti-covered wall on the left and palm trees on the right. A black sedan drives past on the wet street while a pedestrian approaches from the distance through the heavy rain.

events.description: pedestrian runs past the camera on the left side continuing down the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk as a pedestrian runs past in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: man in tank top and jeans jogging past the camera while looking toward the player

entered.detail: red vehicle parked along the curb in the distance
row of street lights receding into the foggy rainy distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the graffiti-lined sidewalk as the approaching pedestrian runs past closely on the left. The sidewalk stretches ahead into the rainy night, lined with palm trees and illuminated by receding street lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rainy suburban intersection into a narrow, graffiti-lined corridor under the night sky. It begins at a crosswalk where wet asphalt reflects the glow of street lamps, before the camera turns left to transition from the open road onto a sidewalk. As the camera moves forward, the environment closes in with a graffiti-covered wall on the left and palm trees on the right, while a black sedan glides past on the rain-slicked street. The scene then shifts as a pedestrian emerges through the heavy rain and runs closely past the camera. Finally, the path stretches further into the rainy night, guided by the receding light of street lamps and a repeating line of palm trees.
